name: Gang wars
short_description: Gang Wars is a fun cartoon arcade shooter! Defeat silly gangsters, collect coins, upgrade weapons, and clear 40 exciting levels full of fast action and funny animations.
detailed_description:
Gang Wars is a lighthearted arcade shooter game for kids and families. The rule is simple: move fast, shoot faster, and stay in the game as long as you can!

You’ll face waves of funny cartoon gangsters — each round they get quicker, stronger, and trickier. Can you defeat them all, collect the coins, and upgrade your gear?

🎮 Game Features

  • 40 fun and challenging levels

  • 13 characters (1 hero + 12 silly rivals)

  • 4 weapon types, plus grenades and bombs

  • Earn coins to upgrade your gun and barricade

  • Bright, funny animations and easy controls

⭐ Why You’ll Love It
Gang Wars is fast, colorful, and addictive — perfect for short play sessions or longer challenges. Kids can enjoy the funny animations and upgrades, while parents can relax knowing it’s all cartoon fun.

So grab your gear, collect the coins, and see if you can survive all 40 levels of action!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
